Defendant'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss Or Stay Action
Off Calendar Feb-15-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT CAREY LIMOUSINE S.F., INC. Defendant'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss Or Stay Action

Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):
Philip Smith, Esq., JACKSON LEWIS P.C., Tel: 415.394.9400, for defendant/moving party Carey Limousine S.F. Inc.;
Julianna Zalinski, Esq. and Zak Franklin, Esq. of FRANKLIN LAW P.C., Tel: 424.258.5129, for plaintiff/opposing party.

The matter was argued. At the conclusion of arguments, DEFENDANT CAREY LIMOUSINE S.F., INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss Or Stay Action is taken under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Angela Pourtabib, CSR#13714, Email: apourtabib@gmail.com, Tel: 415.601.7054. (302/RBU)

*********************************************************************************************

After hearing, the court issued its ruling on DEFENDANT CAREY LIMOUSINE S.F., INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss Or Stay Action - GRANTED. Order signed. (302/RBU)
